_meta.categoryNote: NAVIX is a NON-BANKING entity. The DLT 'Transactional' category is reserved for banks (card / net-banking OTP). Every template below — including the login OTP — MUST be registered as 'Service Implicit'.
_meta.urlNote: The URL https://navixfinance.com MUST be whitelisted under the entity on the SmartPing/DLT portal (URL/APK whitelisting) BEFORE these templates are submitted, or templates containing the link are rejected. OTP is intentionally link-free (links in OTP messages are discouraged and often rejected).
rules: One variable = up to 40 characters. Provide a sample value per variable.
Brand name 'NAVIX Finance' is mandatory inside the content body.
No extra / double / trailing spaces anywhere.
The sent SMS must match the registered template character-for-character (only {#var#} slots substituted).
For SMS render amounts as 'Rs.' not '₹' — '₹' forces UCS-2 (Unicode) SMS: 70 chars/segment and higher cost.
Any URL in a template must be pre-whitelisted on the DLT portal or the template is rejected.

templates.name: NAVIX_OTP_LOGIN
templates.content: Your OTP for NAVIX Finance login is {#var#}. It is valid for {#var#} minutes. Do not share this OTP with anyone. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_KYC_APPROVED
templates.content: Your KYC is verified with NAVIX Finance. Log in at https://navixfinance.com to choose your loan amount. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_KYC_REJECTED
templates.content: We could not verify your KYC with NAVIX Finance. Log in at https://navixfinance.com to review and resubmit. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_KYC_REMINDER
templates.content: Your verification with NAVIX Finance is incomplete. Log in at https://navixfinance.com to complete your pending steps. - NAVIX Finance
templates.note: Improved: dropped the {pendingSteps} variable (the joined step list can exceed the 40-char/variable limit). The detailed list stays in the in-app + email versions. Requires the SMS body in NotificationTemplates.java to be changed to this variable-free text so the sent SMS matches.

templates.name: NAVIX_LOAN_DISBURSED
templates.content: NAVIX Finance has disbursed {#var#} to your bank account. Repay {#var#} by {#var#} at https://navixfinance.com. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_REPAYMENT_VERIFIED
templates.content: Your payment of {#var#} to NAVIX Finance is confirmed. Outstanding balance is {#var#}. View details at https://navixfinance.com. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_REPAYMENT_REJECTED
templates.content: Your payment of {#var#} could not be verified by NAVIX Finance. Log in at https://navixfinance.com to check the reference and record it again. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_PAYMENT_DUE_SOON
templates.content: Your NAVIX Finance payment of {#var#} is due in {#var#} day(s) by {#var#}. Pay at https://navixfinance.com on or after your salary day with no penalty. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_PAYMENT_OVERDUE
templates.content: Your NAVIX Finance payment of {#var#} is overdue by {#var#} day(s). Pay now at https://navixfinance.com to stop the daily penalty and protect your credit score. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_LOAN_CLOSED
templates.content: Your loan with NAVIX Finance is fully repaid and closed. Thank you. Visit https://navixfinance.com to borrow again. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_CREDIT_REJECTED
templates.content: NAVIX Finance is unable to approve your loan application at this time. Visit https://navixfinance.com for details. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_SETTLEMENT_APPROVED
templates.content: A full and final settlement of {#var#} is approved on your NAVIX Finance loan. Pay at https://navixfinance.com to close the loan. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_REBORROW_APPROVED
templates.content: Your repeat loan application with NAVIX Finance is approved. Log in at https://navixfinance.com to choose your amount. - NAVIX Finance

templates.name: NAVIX_REBORROW_REJECTED
templates.content: NAVIX Finance is unable to approve your repeat loan application at this time. Visit https://navixfinance.com for details. - NAVIX Finance
